content_body:
What a great place for our family to be able to gather for a visit - big enough for 12 of us with room to spare! The place is beautiful - it was well worth the effort that it took, for  all of us to be together for the weekend - Hope to be able to this again! 

6 cousins

4 aunts and uncles

2 grandparents!

The Rosses and the Louis'
title: Great Family Reunion at Fallen Timber Lodge
